description_long: This house features a classic gable roof covered with overlapping, light brown shingles, giving it a traditional suburban appearance. The exterior walls are constructed from reddish-brown brick, providing a sturdy and timeless look. The front facade includes a single wooden door centered beneath two rectangular windows with wooden frames, while the sides and rear also display pairs of matching windows. The lower portion of the front and one side wall is decorated with bold, black geometric patterns, adding a modern artistic touch to the otherwise conventional design. The windows are symmetrically arranged, and the house appears to be a two-story structure with no visible porch or steps. The overall form is boxy and compact, suitable for urban or suburban neighborhoods.
description: A two-story brick house with a gable roof, symmetrical windows, and a central wooden door, featuring bold black geometric patterns on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, two rectangular windows above, and black geometric patterns on the brick facade.
description_view_1: Side view displaying two windows and the full expanse of the shingled gable roof, with no door or decorative patterns visible.
description_view_2: Rear view with two windows and a plain brick wall, lacking any entryway or decorative elements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the other side, with two windows and the shingled roof, no door or patterns.
attribute_entryway_design: Central wooden door with no porch or steps, flanked by symmetrical windows and accented by geometric wall patterns.
